mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO synlte.syndmg_table_all( TABLENAME, TABLEPROJECT, TABLECOMMENT, TABLETYPE, LIFECYCLE, TABLESIZE, TABLELASTDATAMODIFIEDTIME, PARTITIONDATE, PARTITIONCOUNT, ISPARTITION, TABLELASTMETAMODIFIEDTIME, TABLECREATEDTIME, INSERTEDDATATIME, TABLEALLCOUNT, PARTITIONSIZE, PARTITIONNUM, DATAID ) VALUES
( #{syndmgTableAll.tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syndmgTableAll.tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syndmgTableAll.tableComment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syndmgTableAll.tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syndmgTableAll.lifeCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syndmgTableAll.tableSize,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syndmgTableAll.tableLastDataModifiedTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syndmgTableAll.partitionData,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syndmgTableAll.partitionCount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syndmgTableAll.isPartition,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syndmgTableAll.tableLastMetaModifiedTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syndmgTableAll.tableCreatedTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syndmgTableAll.insertDataTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syndmgTableAll.tableAllCount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syndmgTableAll.partitionSize,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syndmgTableAll.partitionNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syndmgTableAll.dataId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
